div.p: The fundamental Unix pattern for launching new programs

g.text: exit(int) | flushes stdio buffers | calls atexit handlers | returns to kernel
_exit(int) | NO buffer flush | NO atexit handlers | direct syscall
bits 0-7 | signal | Signal that killed (if signaled)
bit 8 | core dump | Core was dumped flag
bits 16-23 | stop sig | Signal that stopped (if stopped)
WIFSIGNALED(s) | true if killed by signal

text.tspan: // Only reach here if exec FAILED
// Only reach here if exec FAILED
